suspicious_activity.narrative: Patrick Williams, DOB 1998-01-09, residing at PSC 1449, Box 1476, APO AA 87103, engaged in suspicious structuring activity from 2025-02-05 to 2025-08-04. Multiple cash deposits and withdrawals were made just below $10,000, including $7,212.80 on 2025-08-03 and $7,762.48 on 2025-08-02 at Branch Downtown Main. Total transaction volume of $222,070.26 is inconsistent with his occupation as a midwife and reported annual income of $104,667. Accounts involved: CUST_0118_ACC_1 and CUST_0118_ACC_2. Activity suggests potential structuring to evade CTR requirements. Filed under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Numerous cash deposits and withdrawals just below $10,000, indicative of structuring. High transaction volume inconsistent with midwife occupation and income.
